title: Aurora, 61420, Shirley, Shaun the Sheep, Soft Toy, White
features: Based upon the popular TV/Movie Character Shirley Sheep from Shaun the Sheep
Soft and extremely touchable Shirley Sheept soft toy made with high quality materials.
description: Part of the Shaun the Sheep family, Shirley has to be pushed from place to place and can eat just about anything that comes her way. She is the butt of jokes but often the source of great comedy moments and has been known to save the day! Her capacious fleece provides a good hiding place for all manner of unlikely items. Now you can own your very own Shirley the Sheep, 100% official licensed merchandise. Made from the softest and highest quality materials, Shirley is a supersoft rounded sheep with the trademark 3d eyes, measuring 23 cm. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
